event_title: Cisco Spark AI: More Bots! And the Change AI Needs, not the one it Wants
title: Cisco Spark AI: More Bots! And the Change AI Needs, not the one it Wants
description: We have two great talks in this meetup. Cisco presents its vision and Spark+AI strategy. Ople digs into AI for business as a change process. This is a closing meetup in the http://festival.framework.foundation saga, preceded by another one with two great AI talks (https://www.meetup.com/bay-area-ai/events/240597202/), and followed by a party. Be there!
